get.description:
List units for one page
The caller must have any assignment on the target chapter
Auth: `authorization` cookie is preferred over `Authorization` header when both are present

post.description:
Apply one page unit diff and synchronize page and chapter counters

## Operations
Each op in `diff.ops` is classified automatically by the server:
- **CREATE**: set `local_id`, leave `id` empty  Must include `is_bubble`, `is_proofread`, `x_coord`, `y_coord`
- **SAVE (update/upsert)**: set `id` plus >=1 mutable field  Must include all geometry fields (`is_bubble`, `is_proofread`, `x_coord`, `y_coord`)
- **DELETE**: set `id` only, no mutable fields
Mutable fields: `is_bubble`, `is_proofread`, `x_coord`, `y_coord`, `translated_text`, `translator_comment`, `last_translator_id`, `proofread_text`, `proofreader_comment`, `last_proofreader_id`

## `cand_order` (client-suggested reindex order)
An ordered list of unit identifiers to control the final display order after mutations are applied
Use `local_id` for CREATE ops or real `id` for SAVE ops
Must include every `local_id` and `id` from CREATE/SAVE ops  Must exclude all deleted ids  No duplicates  No empty strings
Units not listed in `cand_order` are kept near their original neighbours

## Validation rules (return 400 on failure)
- `diff.page_id` must match the query `page_id`
- Each op must have `local_id` xor `id` (not both, not neither)
- CREATE ops require `is_bubble`, `is_proofread`, `x_coord`, `y_coord`
- SAVE ops require all geometry fields plus at least one mutable field
- The same unit cannot appear in both a CREATE/SAVE op and a DELETE op
- `cand_order` must not contain ids being deleted

## Permission
The caller must be translator or proofreader on the target chapter
Auth: `authorization` cookie is preferred over `Authorization` header when both are present

code.description: `Code` is the HTTP status code mirrored in JSON for client convenience

data.description: `Data` holds the response payload; nil when no body is returned

message.description: `Msg` carries a human-readable error message; empty on success

first_chapter_title.description:
`FirstChapterTitle` is the title for the first chapter to be created together with the comic
If empty, a default chapter titled "CH.0" will be created

description.description: `Desc` is an optional description. nil means use empty string.

name.description: `Name` is the display title of the new workset.

role_mask.description: `RoleMask` specifies assignment roles to be added.

candidate_order.description:
`CandOrder` is the client-suggested unit ordering for reindexing
Use `local_id` for create ops or real `id` for save ops

operations.description: `Ops` is a list of unit operations applied before reindexing

page_id.description: `PageId` identifies the target page and must match the path parameter

id.description: `Id` is the server-assigned unit identifier (set for SAVE and DELETE ops)

is_bubble.description: `IsBubble` indicates whether the unit is a speech bubble (required for CREATE and SAVE)

is_proofread.description: `IsProofread` indicates whether the unit has been proofread (required for CREATE and SAVE)

last_proofreader_id.description: `LastProofreaderId` is the user id of the last proofreader (mutable field for SAVE)

last_translator_id.description: `LastTranslatorId` is the user id of the last translator (mutable field for SAVE)

local_id.description: `LocalId` is a client-generated temporary identifier (set for CREATE ops)

proofread_text.description: `ProofreadText` is the proofread content (mutable field for SAVE)

proofreader_comment.description: `ProofreaderComment` is the proofreader's note (mutable field for SAVE)

translated_text.description: `TranslatedText` is the translated content (mutable field for SAVE)

translator_comment.description: `TranslatorComment` is the translator's note (mutable field for SAVE)

x_coord.description: `XCoord` is the horizontal coordinate (required for CREATE and SAVE)

y_coord.description: `YCoord` is the vertical coordinate (required for CREATE and SAVE)

id.description: `Id` is the generated identifier for the new workset.

description.description:
`Desc` is the new description for `PUT` semantics.
Nil means writing SQL `NULL`.
